status: All 15 research strategies are now included in train / validation / test evaluation. These are baseline upgraded parameters; full grid search is the next step.

splits.label: Train
splits.purpose: Estimate baseline behavior and fit time-series / ML components.

splits.label: Validation
splits.purpose: Select parameters without touching the final test period.

splits.label: Test
splits.purpose: Final out-of-sample evaluation using parameters chosen on validation.

objective.reason: The objective rewards risk-adjusted return and drawdown efficiency, while discouraging large drawdowns. Turnover penalty will be added after parameter-grid backtests are generated.

models.name: V1 Momentum-Vol Research Model
models.note: 252-day stock momentum; top 3; inverse vol; 10.0% vol target

parameters.trainingMeaning: V1 training means selecting stable momentum, selection and volatility-scaling parameters.

approval.reason: Useful signal, but parameters or turnover/drawdown controls need more work.

models.name: V2 HMM-GARCH-MVO
models.note: Two-state Gaussian HMM, GARCH(1,1) likelihood grid and capped long-only MVO

parameters.trainingMeaning: V2 training means estimating HMM/GARCH on the training window and selecting MVO hyperparameters on validation.

approval.reason: Useful signal, but parameters or turnover/drawdown controls need more work.

models.name: V3 Boosted Trees + Attribution
models.note: Walk-forward regularized gradient-boosted decision stumps with additive feature attribution

parameters.trainingMeaning: V3 training means fitting the boosted model on training data and choosing ML hyperparameters by validation performance.

approval.reason: Strong validation/test risk-adjusted performance with acceptable drawdown.

models.name: S1 AI Capex Momentum+
models.note: Upgraded AI infrastructure strategy: 12-1 stock momentum plus QQQ/XLK AI-risk confirmation, volatility targeting and hedge sleeve.

parameters.trainingMeaning: Train the AI-capex factor weight and hedge sleeve so the strategy does not simply chase technology beta.

approval.reason: Strong validation/test risk-adjusted performance with acceptable drawdown.

models.name: S2 Quality Growth Barbell+
models.note: Upgraded quality-growth barbell: quality proxy, growth acceleration, low-vol hedge that expands during market stress.

parameters.trainingMeaning: Train the quality/growth balance and stress hedge intensity.

approval.reason: Strong validation/test risk-adjusted performance with acceptable drawdown.

models.name: S3 Crowding-Aware Momentum+
models.note: Upgraded anti-crowding momentum: penalizes one-month chase, volatility spikes and crowded momentum ETF conditions.

parameters.trainingMeaning: Train how strongly the model penalizes crowded or overheated momentum.

approval.reason: Strong validation/test risk-adjusted performance with acceptable drawdown.

models.name: S4 Low-Vol Alpha Shield+
models.note: Upgraded low-vol shield: medium trend, 200-day trend confirmation, drawdown penalty and lower target volatility.

parameters.trainingMeaning: Train the low-volatility penalty and conservative risk budget.

approval.reason: Strong validation/test risk-adjusted performance with acceptable drawdown.

models.name: S5 Regime-Switch Equity Hedge+
models.note: Upgraded regime hedge: blends SPY trend, HYG/IEF credit momentum, TLT rates signal and volatility stress into a risk-on score.

parameters.trainingMeaning: Train the macro regime threshold and how much exposure shifts into hedges.

approval.reason: Strong validation/test risk-adjusted performance with acceptable drawdown.

models.name: S6 Credit-Liquidity Accelerator+
models.note: Upgraded credit-liquidity accelerator: uses high-yield/Treasury relative momentum as a credit cycle proxy before increasing equity beta.

parameters.trainingMeaning: Train the credit-cycle trigger before increasing equity beta.

approval.reason: Strong validation/test risk-adjusted performance with acceptable drawdown.

models.name: S7 Revision-Proxy Growth Rank+
models.note: Upgraded revision proxy: adds short-term acceleration and trend confirmation to the price-based earnings-revision proxy.

parameters.trainingMeaning: Train the price-based revision proxy and volatility-stability penalty.

approval.reason: Strong validation/test risk-adjusted performance with acceptable drawdown.

models.name: S8 Trend-Guarded Reversion+
models.note: Upgraded guarded reversion: buys pullbacks only above 200-day trend, with drawdown and volatility filters.

parameters.trainingMeaning: Train the pullback signal only under trend-confirmed conditions.

approval.reason: Research candidate only; evidence is not strong enough for approval.

models.name: S9 Sector-Breadth Rotation+
models.note: Upgraded sector-breadth rotation: sector ETF breadth and leading-sector momentum decide risk budget, then stocks receive allocation.

parameters.trainingMeaning: Train when broad market participation is strong enough to use a higher equity budget.

approval.reason: Useful signal, but parameters or turnover/drawdown controls need more work.

models.name: S10 Defensive Growth Stabilizer+
models.note: Upgraded defensive stabilizer: combines quality proxy with volatility stress hedge, designed for smoother downside behavior.

parameters.trainingMeaning: Train defensive growth allocation and stress hedge size.

approval.reason: Strong validation/test risk-adjusted performance with acceptable drawdown.

models.name: S11 Tail-Risk Shock Absorber+
models.note: Upgraded tail-risk absorber: reacts to drawdown, volatility, credit stress and combined regime score before moving into hedges.

parameters.trainingMeaning: Train tail-risk trigger thresholds and hedge severity.

approval.reason: Strong validation/test risk-adjusted performance with acceptable drawdown.

models.name: S12 Adaptive Volatility Compounder+
models.note: Upgraded adaptive volatility compounder: target volatility changes with market stress and stock selection includes trend confirmation.

parameters.trainingMeaning: Train the dynamic volatility target and leverage cap across regimes.

approval.reason: Useful signal, but parameters or turnover/drawdown controls need more work.

paperPortfolio.mode: Paper portfolio target allocation; no live capital or brokerage execution.

nextSteps: Run parameter grid search on the validation period for all 15 strategies.
Keep the final test period untouched until parameter selection is complete.
Add walk-forward monthly parameter selection after the initial grid search.
Record every parameter change in paper/strategy_research_log.md and results/strategy_change_log.csv.
